title: Eternity
content:
O years!    and age!    farewell:
Behold I go,
Where I do know
Infinity to dwell.

And these mine eyes shall see
All times, how they
Are lost i' th' sea
Of vast eternity:

Where never moon shall sway
The stars; but she,
And night, shall be
Drown'd in one endless day.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Eternity"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
